body_txt: A character is afforded entrance to an elite group by virtue of an unexpected success or new connections. If they are already one of the local elite, the new group they joins is even more so — more exclusive or secretive, or traveling in even higher social circles, or recognized over a larger geographical area — something with some cachet. The group could be a winning sports team, a selective private club, or just the "in" clique of " beautiful people ". Enjoying their newfound elevation, they snub or are pressured to snub their old friends , who respond with anger or dismay at their apparent betrayal. However, after extended exposure to the members of their new social circle, they invariably find them shallow and/or bigoted , particularly against some faction represented in his previous social circle . At the risk of ruining any future chance for social improvement , they leave their new clique and returns to the forgiving arms of their original band of friends. Often the basis for a Very Special Episode . This plot can also develop out of a Rags to Riches situation. See also I Just Want to Have Friends , Celebrity is Overrated , Lonely at the Top , Popular Is Evil , Pygmalion Plot , Pygmalion Snap Back , Slobs Versus Snobs .
